message:
fix: neutral task_list output — report state, don't give imperatives

task_list tool's "Mark it in_progress to begin" phrasing primed
coordinators (especially with zero reasoning tokens) to interpret
"begin" as "begin implementing" rather than "begin by delegating."

Replace imperative guidance with factual state reporting:
- "No in_progress task. Next open task: #N — ..."
- "No in_progress task. Open tasks: ..."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
